title: Compliance — SOC 2, HIPAA, GDPR, PCI-DSS, EU AI Act, ISO 42001

questions.question: When does EU AI Act enforcement for high-risk systems begin?
questions.question_zh: 欧盟 AI 法案对高风险系统的执行何时开始？
options: February 2, 2025
August 2, 2026
Already fully enforced in 2024
January 1, 2030
options_zh: 2024 年已全面执行

questions.question: Which two-tier fine ceiling does the EU AI Act define?
questions.question_zh: 欧盟 AI 法案定义了哪种双层罚款上限？
options: Up to €1M flat for any violation
Up to €100K for any violation
Up to €15M or 3% global annual turnover for high-risk-system obligations (Art. 99(4)); up to €35M or 7% for prohibited AI practices (Art. 99(3))
No financial penalties, only takedown orders
options_zh: 任何违规行为最高 100 万欧元固定罚款
任何违规行为最高 10 万欧元固定罚款
高风险系统义务违规（第 99(4) 条）最高 1500 万欧元或全球年营业额 3%；禁止性 AI 行为违规（第 99(3) 条）最高 3500 万欧元或 7%
无经济处罚，仅下架令

questions.question: Why is post-processing PII cleanup not a defensible GDPR posture?
questions.question_zh: 为什么事后处理 PII 清理不是可靠的 GDPR 合规姿态？
options: It is too slow at scale
GDPR forbids redaction entirely
Post-processing is identical to real-time
The model already saw the data, so real-time inference-layer redaction (before the LLM call) is the defensible 2026 standard
options_zh: 大规模下太慢
GDPR 完全禁止编辑
事后处理与实时处理相同
模型已经看到了数据，所以实时 inference 层编辑（在 LLM 调用之前）才是 2026 年可靠的标准

questions.question: What is the practical difference between SOC 2 Type I and Type II?
questions.question_zh: SOC 2 Type I 和 Type II 在实践中有什么区别？
options: Type I requires HIPAA BAA
Type I is more rigorous than Type II
Type I attests controls designed and documented; Type II attests controls operating effectively over 6-12 months
Type II is for startups only
options_zh: Type I 需要 HIPAA BAA
Type I 比 Type II 更严格
Type I 证明控制措施已设计和记录；Type II 证明控制措施在 6-12 个月内有效运行
Type II 仅适用于初创公司

questions.question: What does cross-framework control mapping aim to deliver?
questions.question_zh: 跨框架控制映射旨在实现什么？
options: One control policy that satisfies multiple framework requirements (e.g. access logging maps to ISO 27001 A.5.15-5.18, GDPR Art. 32, HIPAA §164.312(a))
Eliminating audits
Replacing all frameworks with ISO 42001
More distinct controls per framework
options_zh: 一个满足多个框架要求的控制策略（例如访问日志映射到 ISO 27001 A.5.15-5.18、GDPR Art. 32、HIPAA §164.312(a)）
消除审计
用 ISO 42001 替换所有框架
为每个框架增加更多不同的控制

questions.question: What does the lesson recommend for HIPAA + LLM workloads?
questions.question_zh: 课程对 HIPAA + LLM 工作负载有什么建议？
options: HIPAA does not apply to LLMs
Never send PHI to an external AI service without a signed BAA; all three hyperscalers and major LLM API providers offer BAAs
Use only on-prem models, never managed
Ship PHI to any provider; BAA is optional
options_zh: HIPAA 不适用于 LLM
未签署 BAA 前绝不向外部 AI 服务发送 PHI；三大云厂商和主要 LLM API 提供商都提供 BAA
只用本地模型，绝不用托管服务
可向任何提供商发送 PHI；BAA 可选
